title: disporum longistylum
intro: Disporum longistylum, also known as the Chinese clouded gentian, is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to China and other parts of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Disporum longistylum include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are commonly made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
